profile: Junior Fullstack Developer (career changer) with a background in UI/UX and digital product work and recent intensive training in software engineering. Completed 42 Berlin (project-based, peer-reviewed curriculum with strong C/systems fundamentals) and the RS School Frontend course. Comfortable building UIs, integrating APIs, writing tests, and debugging issues. Looking for a junior/intern role in Berlin.

items: Languages: C, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS (plus basic Python)
Testing & quality: Vitest, ESLint, Prettier, Git/GitHub
Debugging/tools: Linux, Valgrind, GDB, VS Code, Vim

bullets.text: Built a responsive eCommerce app: login/registration, product catalog, product details, basket, and checkout flow.
Worked in a high pace team environment with consistent code quality (linting/formatting) and pre-commit checks.
Added automated tests with Vitest and maintained a smooth developer workflow with Vite.
Implemented command parsing and execution, including core builtins (cd/echo/export/unset/exit).
Implemented pipes and I/O redirections with careful file descriptor and memory management.

projects.name: Multiplayer online game (42 Berlin final project)
projects.tagline: Fullstack real-time multiplayer web application with synchronized gameplay
projects.stack: Team project • React • TypeScript • Vite • Docker • WebSockets • Node.js

bullets.text: Acted as Technical Lead, driving architecture decisions, defining project structure, and ensuring code quality across frontend and backend.
Designed and implemented real-time multiplayer synchronization using WebSockets, enabling low-latency state updates across connected clients.
Architected and optimized drawing synchronization with incremental stroke updates to reduce network load and improve performance.
Developed interactive frontend using React and TypeScript, integrating live game state, player roles, and room-based sessions.
Led technical alignment within the team through code reviews, module ownership, and structured feature planning.

experience.title: UI/UX + digital product roles (Russia) — Web/Email design, cross-functional collaboration
bullets: Worked with stakeholders and teams to deliver customer-facing digital materials and consistent brand experience.

experience.title: Relocation to Germany & language training
bullets: Relocated to Germany; completed German language learning and integration tasks.

education.title: 42 Berlin — Software Engineering (in progress)
education.details: Project-based curriculum focused on C/C++, algorithms, system programming, debugging, peer code reviews, and collaborative development.

education.title: RS School — Frontend Development (completed)
education.details: Hands-on training in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frontend tooling, including responsive design and application architecture.

education.title: Code University — TechStart Program
education.details: Intensive preparatory program covering programming fundamentals, web technologies, and problem-solving with a focus on practical, project-based learning.

education.title: HSE University (Moscow) — Bachelor in Graphic & Web Design
education.details: Foundation in visual design, UX/UI principles, and digital media, with a focus on combining creativity and technical implementation.
